shot_types.name: establishing wide shot
shot_types.description: shows the full environment to set location and scale

shot_types.name: full body shot
shot_types.description: captures the subject head to toe within the frame

shot_types.name: medium shot
shot_types.description: frames the subject from the waist up, balancing detail and context

shot_types.name: medium close-up
shot_types.description: chest and shoulders, ideal for conversation and expression

shot_types.name: close-up
shot_types.description: face fills the frame, emphasizing emotion and detail

shot_types.name: extreme close-up
shot_types.description: tight on a single feature — eyes, hands, object detail

shot_types.name: aerial bird's eye
shot_types.description: looking straight down, subjects and environment from above

shot_types.name: POV first person
shot_types.description: camera is the character's eyes, immersive perspective

shot_types.name: over-the-shoulder
shot_types.description: frames a subject from behind another, conversational tension

shot_types.name: two-shot
shot_types.description: two subjects share the frame equally, relationship dynamic

shot_types.name: Dutch angle
shot_types.description: tilted frame creates psychological unease or tension

camera_movements.name: static hold
camera_movements.description: camera is completely still, subjects move within the frame

camera_movements.name: slow pan left
camera_movements.description: camera rotates horizontally to the left, surveying the scene

camera_movements.name: slow pan right
camera_movements.description: camera rotates horizontally to the right

camera_movements.name: tilt up
camera_movements.description: camera rotates upward, revealing height or grandeur

camera_movements.name: tilt down
camera_movements.description: camera rotates downward, grounding or revealing below

camera_movements.name: dolly push in
camera_movements.description: camera physically moves forward toward the subject, building intimacy

camera_movements.name: dolly pull out
camera_movements.description: camera physically moves backward, revealing wider context

camera_movements.name: crane rise
camera_movements.description: camera lifts upward, ascending to show scale or transcendence

camera_movements.name: crane lower
camera_movements.description: camera descends from height down to subject level

camera_movements.name: tracking shot
camera_movements.description: camera moves alongside the subject maintaining relative position

camera_movements.name: handheld follow
camera_movements.description: slightly shaky camera follows subject, raw documentary feel

camera_movements.name: orbit left
camera_movements.description: camera circles around the subject counterclockwise

camera_movements.name: orbit right
camera_movements.description: camera circles around the subject clockwise

camera_movements.name: whip pan
camera_movements.description: rapid horizontal camera rotation creating a blur transition

camera_movements.name: zoom in
camera_movements.description: optical zoom tightens the frame, isolating the subject

camera_movements.name: slow push and tilt
camera_movements.description: combined gentle forward movement with upward tilt, epic reveal feel

lens_types.name: ultra-wide angle
lens_types.description: extreme field of view, dramatic perspective distortion, expansive environments

lens_types.name: wide angle
lens_types.description: broad field of view, environmental context, slight edge distortion

lens_types.name: standard 50mm
lens_types.description: natural human perspective, balanced and neutral

lens_types.name: medium telephoto 85mm
lens_types.description: flattering portrait compression, slightly separated subject from background

lens_types.name: telephoto 135mm
lens_types.description: strong background compression, subjects pop from blurred surroundings

lens_types.name: super telephoto
lens_types.description: extreme compression, stalking/observational feel, distant subjects

lens_types.name: macro
lens_types.description: extreme close focus on tiny details, texture becomes landscape
